## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.6

### 🔔 Notifications
- Keeps camera notification taps limited to the X-Sense Recordings panel instead of raw media, external, or backend playback URLs.
- Treats the previous camera notification blueprint as stale so Home Assistant can prompt users to refresh imported blueprints.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Keeps cached recording media separate from the notification click target.
- Keeps playback and thumbnail requests inside Home Assistant instead of redirecting the recordings panel to external media URLs.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds rendered blueprint-template coverage for valid panel links, raw media paths, external URLs, and invalid panel-like paths.
- Adds regression coverage for cached event media, signed playback usage, and panel playback/thumbnail no-redirect behavior.
